message: 🌱 Add argo: Support for Azure Entra workload identity  mission (#619)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-13334-support-for-azure-entra-workload-identity",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo: Support for Azure Entra workload identity ",
+    "description": "Support for Azure Entra workload identity . Requested by 64+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current argo deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your argo version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo\nhelm list -n argo 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working argo installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo\nkubectl get configmap -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo\n```\nMore and more cloud providers are supporting the concept of workload identity. I believe this is also already supported in argocd for GCP. It would be great if ArgoCD also implemented the token exchange for a"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support for Azure Entra workload identity ",
+        "description": "Workaround for the poor souls who found this through google and are stuck in the same place:\n\n```bash\nexport ACR_NAME=\"targetacr\"\n# The username of the TARGET account\nexport USER_NAME=\"argocd-helm-token-$ACR_NAME\"\n# Creates a token\nexport PASSWORD=$(az acr token create -n $USER_NAME \\\n             \n```yaml\nexport ACR_NAME=\"targetacr\"\n# The username of the TARGET account\nexport USER_NAME=\"argocd-helm-token-$ACR_NAME\"\n# Creates a token\nexport PASSWORD=$(az acr token create -n $USER_NAME \\\n                  -r $ACR_NAME \\\n                  --scope-map _repositories_pull \\\n                  --only-show-errors \\\n                  --query \"credentials.passwords[0].value\" -o tsv)\n# add the repo to argo\n argocd repo add $ACR_NAME.azurecr.io/helm --username $USER_NAME --password $PASSWORD --enable-oci --type helm --name helm --project default\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo\nkubectl get events -n argo --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support for Azure Entra workload identity \" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Workaround for the poor souls who found this through google and are stuck in the same place:\n\n```bash\nexport ACR_NAME=\"targetacr\"\n# The username of the TARGET account\nexport USER_NAME=\"argocd-helm-token-$ACR_NAME\"\n# Creates a token\nexport PASSWORD=$(az acr token create -n $USER_NAME \\\n                  -r $ACR_NAME \\\n                  --scope-map _repositories_pull \\\n                 ",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "export ACR_NAME=\"targetacr\"\n# The username of the TARGET account\nexport USER_NAME=\"argocd-helm-token-$ACR_NAME\"\n# Creates a token\nexport PASSWORD=$(az acr token create -n $USER_NAME \\\n                  -r $ACR_NAME \\\n                  --scope-map _repositories_pull \\\n                  --only-show-errors \\\n                  --query \"credentials.passwords[0].value\" -o tsv)\n# add the repo to argo\n argocd repo add $ACR_NAME.azurecr.io/helm --username $USER_NAME --password $PASSWORD --enable-oci --type helm --name helm --project default"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
